title: The Founder Office Charter
subtitle: Capability Discovery, Opportunity Intelligence, and Venture Formation
purpose: Help founders discover, evaluate, and transform latent capability within the Polity into products, services, ventures, institutions, and outcomes.
is: a capability discovery and opportunity intelligence service powered by the metaCommons

firstPrinciple.foundersCreateValueBy: identifying capability latent within information and transforming that capability into useful work

proofOfWorkPotential.premise: The most valuable opportunities are often invisible before they are realized.
proofOfWorkPotential.note: PoWP is defined and enshrined in the Polity Paper series (Qriptopian codex) — pending ingestion as constitutional commentary.

constitutionalPrinciple: Founder Office exists to help citizens transform truthful information into useful capability and useful capability into meaningful outcomes. Its purpose is not extraction; its purpose is venture formation, capability development, and value creation within the Polity.
engineStatus: constitutional_only — the operational Founder Office (the Founder Operator Venture Blueprint engine downstream of the metaCommons) is a later workstream; PRD and schema pending.
